epigraph.quote: A lovely windy, part-sunny day. Elevenses in the lay-by & lunch on the sea front.

per_stop.quote: A still flexible star fish Peter found for John
We looked around the museum, it even had the old smell of a ticket office.
When I went to pay her £3 in the morning, she said to give a £ each to the 3 boys.
The kind vicar gave us a blessing after the service.
Lovely stones. Dormitory clearly laid out.
Eve felt very sick with vertigo + backed of.
